prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PJEGFTSD-7PC-SML-SLVR Product Type: SCREWDRIVER Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 7pc Precision Jewelers Eyeglass Repair Kit Screwdriver Set Hobby Tools (0.6 - 1.6mm) Description: Designed for taking on small repairs, whether it be for watches or jewelry, eyeglasses, sunglasses, cameras and other electronics, ToolTreaux’s mini precision screwdriver set includes seven flat head tips in the following sizes: 0.6mm, 0.7mm, 0.8mm, 1.0mm, 1.2mm, 1.5mm and 1.6mm.

In addition to the seven flat head bits included, the portable screwdriver set also features an extra reversible tip within the body of the handle; the screw chuck easily spins off to reveal the extra tip in each handle. Precision screwdriver set contains assorted colored bezels to easily identify the different sizes included. And, with brass body construction, this set ensures durability and longevity for all your creative and repair projects, at home or on the go.

The hobby tools set also comes with a small clear slotted storage bag to keep tools organized and together.

This is the perfect precision screwdriver set for around the house, office, garage, workshop, design studio, or just to have handy to adjust eyeglasses, watches or other small electronics when needed.

Screwdriver Length: 3 inches Set Weight: 0.10bs Search Terms: watch repair kit eye glass repairing kit hand hobby tools precision screwdriver set jewelry making supplies bezel drill bit set electronics screwdriver set Features: - PRECISION SCREWDRIVER SET: Ideal for jewelry, electronics or eye glass repairing kit, the set comes with x7 mini flathead screwdrivers with assorted rotating bezels; - COLORED BEZELS: Precision screwdriver set contains assorted colored bezels to easily identify the different sizes included; convenient and portable set features an extra reversible tip with the body of the handle by spinning off the screw chuck - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Aluminum body ensures durability and longevity for all your creative and repair projects at home or on the go; included small vinyl slotted tool pouch to keep tools organized and together - SCREWDRIVER SET SIZES: 0.6mm, 0.7mm, 0.8mm, 1.0mm, 1.2mm, 1.5mm and 1.6mm - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 5 x 4 x 1 inches; Screwdriver Length: 3 inches; Weight: 0.10bs; Color: Multi === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 7-pc Precision Jewelers Screwdriver Set Silver

anthropic.title_differentiation: 7 Flathead Tips 06-16Mm, Colored Bezels, Extra Reversible Tip, Brass Body, Storage Pouch

openai.title_differentiation: 7 Flathead Tips, Reversible Handle Tip, Color-Coded Bezels, Brass Body, Storage Pouch, For Watches And Eyeglasses
